name: multi-agent-iam-dashboard
description: Multi-Agent IAM Dashboard - Custom Implementation Service

scripts.dev:backend: cd apps/backend && uv run uvicorn src.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.build:backend: cd apps/backend && uv run python -m build
scripts.lint:backend: cd apps/backend && uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy src/
scripts.format:backend: cd apps/backend && uv run ruff format .
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/backend && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:migration: cd apps/backend && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate

author: Multi-Agent IAM Dashboard Team
